notes: CALICHE.BBS — Lubbock, TX. WIRE_MOTHER is sysop. West Texas dust register; she uses the foal register from the W11 glossary. The original demon-binding code lives in a sticky thread here, pinned for 15 years. Three boards: the pasture (general), the barn (technical/the sticky), the kitchen (regulars).

boards.name: the_pasture
boards.subtitle: general · the wide field
boards.flavor: Where the matriarch posts the weather and the news from the high plains.

boards.name: the_barn
boards.subtitle: the sticky · the binding · the technical
boards.flavor: Where the binding code sticky lives. Read it if you're new. Don't post in it.

boards.name: the_kitchen
boards.subtitle: the regulars · food · the wedding shower roster
boards.flavor: The matriarch is in. The kettle's on.
